title: amorphophallus lanceolatus
intro: Amorphophallus lanceolatus, also known as the Indian giant arum or tiger arum, is a plant species that belongs to the Arum family and is native to India. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and is often used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Amorphophallus lanceolatus include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations are also used to treat digestive issues and as a natural remedy for cold and flu symptoms.
